programme.title: August: Osage County
programme.desc: A crisis unites a group of siblings at the Oklahoma house they grew up in with their dysfunctional mom.

programme.title: Boy A
programme.desc: The story of Jack, newly released from serving a prison sentence for a violent crime he committed as a child.

programme.title: Albert Nobbs
programme.desc: A woman poses as a man in order to survive in repressive 19th century Ireland.

programme.title: The Dresser
programme.desc: Sir reflects on his accomplishments and seeks to reconcile his turbulent friendships with those in his employ.

programme.title: The Death and Life of John F. Donovan
programme.desc: A young actor reminisces about a dead American TV star and the correspondence they shared.

programme.title: Godsend
programme.desc: A couple agree to have their deceased son cloned, but bizarre things happen several years after his rebirth.

programme.title: Sands of Oblivion
programme.desc: An archaeologist couple and an Iraq War combat veteran uncover a replica of ancient Egypt made for a movie.

programme.title: Upworld
programme.desc: An LA police detective partners up with a talking gnome in order to bring down the head of a crime ring.

programme.title: Skyline
programme.desc: Strange lights over Los Angeles herald the arrival of malevolent aliens who threaten to swallow up humanity.

programme.title: Jericho
programme.desc: A mysterious gunman searches for his lost identity.

programme.title: War of the Buttons
programme.desc: A pre-teen rebel in WWII-occupied France unites a group of kids to protect a young Jewish girl from Nazis.

programme.title: Killers
programme.desc: Spencer is an assassin in love. But a picture-perfect marriage will not save the couple from becoming targets.

programme.title: Escape Plan
programme.desc: The world's authority on structural security accepts a job to break out of an ultra-secret, high-tech facility

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: MovieSphere provides Hollywood movies, blockbuster hits, and general entertainment programming.
